data.description:
Each time you enable this module on your personal vehicle, choose a damage type: air, bolt, earth, fire or ice. Creatures aboard this personal vehicle are treated as being Resistant to the chosen damage type until this module remains enabled.

Targets Receive: @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.vehicle-modules.Item.jv7iQAgxbAPxlgoy], @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.vehicle-modules.Item.qhnavaTu9QpEqtJS], @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.vehicle-modules.Item.Nxjt8wn0Bpa4aHbH], @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.vehicle-modules.Item.MJuCHhlM3wpbhiDP], or @EFFECT[Compendium.projectfu.vehicle-modules.Item.N8rWmTrC0t79NCmn]
